---
title: "Participant Details | R for Researchers"
subtitle: "3rd SARA Summer School"
author: "22-26 July 2026 | Sonipat, HR, India"
date: today
date-format: long
format:
  typst:
    page-orientation: landscape
abstract-title: "Welcome!"
classoption: "landscape"
abstract: |
  |
  |
  | THIS IS THE FINAL LIST 
  | 
  |  
  | 
  |
  |
  | Dr. Ajay Kumar 
  | Founder & Director
  | Contact: 925 315 2024
  | Email: sara.institute.info@gmail.com
---

```{=typst}
#set page(
  flipped: true,
  header: [
  Participants of 3rd SARA Summer School "R for Researchers"
  #h(1fr)
  #box(image("logo-sara.png", width:5%))
])

#set page(footer: context [
  Event website https://sara-edu.netlify.app/summer/2026-r4b/
  #h(1fr)
  #counter(page).display(
  "1/1",
  both: true,
)
])
```


```{=typst} 
#v(10pt)

#set table(
  fill: (x, y) =>
    if x == 0 or y == 0 {
      gray.lighten(40%)
    },
  align: right,
  
)


#show table.cell.where(x: 0): strong
#show table.cell.where(y: 0): strong

#table(
  columns: (0.3fr, 1fr, 0.5fr, 0.5fr, 1fr, 0.5fr),
  rows: (1.25cm),
  stroke: 0.5pt + rgb("666675"), 
  align: left + horizon,

  table.header(

    [S.No.], [*Name of the Participant*], [*Seat Type*], [*Place*], [*Education*], [*Contact*],
  ),

  [1.], [*Vaishnavi Humane*], [Fully Funded], [Mumbai, MH], [MA Education, Nagpur Univeristy], [93221 54217],
  [2.], [Dr. Ashok Kumar], [Early Bird], [Chandigarh], [Professor Bioinformatics, Panjab Univeristy], [79738 89824],
  [3.], [Rajat Kumar], [Early Bird], [New Delhi], [UG Student of Data Science, IIT Madras], [85108 33433],
  [4.], [*Aishwarya Karan*], [Early Bird], [New Delhi], [PhD Student of Law, Delhi University], [96546 67897],
  [5.], [*Dr. Priyanka Choudhary*], [Early Bird], [Jaipur, RJ], [Assistant Professor, Political Science, Delhi Univeristy], [94143 63424],
  [6.], [*Kajal Mahor*], [Fully Funded], [Wardha, MH], [BSc Biology, Azim Premji University], [99755 84007],
  [7.], [*Achal Bujade*], [Fully Funded], [Wardha, MH], [BSc Biology, Azim Premji University], [84219 66582],
  [8.], [Yogendra Kumar], [Regular Price], [Delhi], [PhD Student, Sociology, Delhi University], [80036 26067],
  [9.], [Tushar Jadhav], [Fully Funded], [Bengaluru], [MA Urban Economy, IIHS University], [77094 03143],
  [10.], [*Vidhata Tamgadge*], [Fully Funded], [Wardha, MH], [BSc Biology, Azim Premji University], [76667 04679],
  [11.], [*Ankita Hirwani*], [Fully Funded], [New Dehi], [MA Sociology, DSE, Delhi University], [87073 59179],
)

```

**Female Participants = 08**

Total participants = 15 

## Two Guest Speakers

### 1. Dr. Nikee Silayach, Manipal Univeristy Jaipur

3rd SARA Summer School Data Science Educator, 22-26 July 2026

### 2. Shivani Srivastava, Data Scientist

3rd SARA Summer School Speaker, 22-26 July 2026
